calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Sep-08-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Judgment Debtor BALTAZAR AVALOS, Tel No. 415-656-7775 appearing in pro per (RAFAEL QUISPE present assisting Mr. Avalos as a Spanish-language interpreter);
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court's tentative ruling required parties to appear at the hearing. Argument present by the judgment debtor. Matter submitted. The Court rules as follows: Judgment Debtor Balthazar Avalos' Claim of Exemption is granted in part and denied in part. The wage garnishment against Mr. Avalos is reduced to $100.00 every two weeks ($200.00 per month). Any funds currently held by the levying officer shall be released to the judgment creditor. The Court shall sign and mail out an order to parties and Sheriff's Office. Judge: John K. Stewart; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

Motion/Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Mar-13-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Notice of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption of Baltazar Avalos - The hearing is off calendar. The Sheriff's department informed the court that defendant never filed the claim of exemption with the Sheriff. Judge : Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/ehg

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-23-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-23-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant BALTAZAR AVALOS, an individual.
Declaration of pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., and against Defendant Baltazar Avalos, an individual.
Principal $8,464.27
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $295.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $8,759.27
Judgment signed in open court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Initial Responses To Plaintiff'S Discovery - Special Interrogatories (Set One) And For An Order Deeming The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Plaintiff'S Request For Admissions (Set One) As Admitted
Off Calendar May-20-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Philip Kilduff, Esq (415-673-0368) specially appearing for Wells Fargo Bank, N.A. Plaintiff and moving party.
No other appearance on the matter.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion To Compel Initial Responses To Plaintiff'S Discovery - Special Interrogatories (Set One) And For An Order Deeming The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Plaintiff'S Request For Admissions (Set One) As Admitted is Granted, for reasons set forth in Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'s motion, which is unopposed. Defendant Baltazar Avalos is ordered to respond to Plaintiff's Special Interrogatories (Set One), without objection, within 15 days from the date the written Order on this motion. It is further ordered that the truth of the matters specified in Plaintiff's Request for Admissions (Set One) propounded on Defendant Baltazar Avalos is deemed admitted. Order is signed in Open Court. (See scanned order for details).
Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Huibonhoa, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported.=(302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2014 Set For Trial On Jun-23-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
